svg.text: McCzarny recently worked on his
chromium-daily-digest project, adding missing
summaries and enhancing the service's
robustness by implementing retry logic for HTTP
503 errors. He adjusted parameters to optimize
Gemini API usage and migrated the LLM provider
to gemini-3.1-flash-lite, also adding tags to
summaries. In his crater-js game project, he
made substantial progress, renaming "World" to
"Region" and introducing dynamic region
modifiers that impact world generation and
gameplay. He developed new enemy types,
including a digging Worm Mob and a transforming
Stone Beetle, expanding character animations
for the worm. Other crater-js updates involved
adding icons for region modifiers, implementing
mining animations, and introducing character
traits. Furthermore, McCzarny contributed to
the microsoft/vscode project by twice reporting
a bug where Agent mode fails to process a
prompt due to a session timeout, providing
detailed console errors.
Generated on: Sun May 31 04:17:14 2026
